onChange.script:
# Tree's bidirectional writeback hands us BasicQualifiedValue
	# wrappers around the node's data dict + every nested field.
	# Deep-unwrap before passing Ids across module boundaries --
	# NQ param-binding rejects the wrappers with a ClassCastException.
	prev = BlueRidge.Common.Util.extractQualifiedValues(previousValue.value) if previousValue else None
	curr = BlueRidge.Common.Util.extractQualifiedValues(currentValue.value) if currentValue else None
	prevId = prev.get("id") if prev else None
	currId = curr.get("id") if curr else None
	if currId is None or currId == prevId:
		return
	if self.view.custom.mode == "create":
		return
	
	if not self.custom.dirty:
		self.view.rootContainer.handleLocationChange(currId)
	else:
		system.perspective.openPopup(
			id="mpp-confirm-unsaved",
			view="BlueRidge/Components/Popups/ConfirmUnsaved",
			modal=True,
			showCloseIcon=False,
			params={
				"title":   "Unsaved Changes",
				"message": "You have unsaved changes to this location. Discard before closing?",
			},
		)

config.script:
system.perspective.openPopup(
		id="mpp-loc-type-editor",
		view="BlueRidge/Components/Popups/LocationTypeEditor",
		modal=True,
		draggable=False,
		showCloseIcon=False,
		resizable=False,
		overlayDismiss=False,
		viewportBound=True
	)

sel = self.view.custom.selected
	if not sel or sel.get("id") is None:
		BlueRidge.Common.Notify.toast("Pick a parent", "Select a Location in the tree first.", "warning")
		return
	parentId = sel.get("id")
	parentLevel = sel.get("hierarchyLevel")
	currentTree = self.view.custom.tree
	init = BlueRidge.Location.Location.beginCreate(parentId, parentLevel, currentTree)
	if not init:
		return
	self.view.custom.tree = init["tree"]
	self.view.custom.draftPath = init["draftPath"]
	self.view.custom.selectedPath = init["draftPath"]
	self.view.custom.selected = {"id": None, "name": "(new Location)", "hierarchyLevel": parentLevel}
	self.view.custom.editDraft = {"meta": init["meta"], "attributes": []}
	self.view.custom.mode = "create"
	self.view.custom.dirty = True

if self.view.custom.mode == "create":
		# Discard the draft entirely; rebuild tree from DB
		self.view.custom.tree = BlueRidge.Location.Tree.buildTree(1, 2, "mpp/factory")
		self.view.custom.selected = None
		self.view.custom.selectedPath = "0"
		self.view.custom.editDraft = {"meta": None, "attributes": []}
		self.view.custom.mode = "view"
		self.view.custom.draftPath = None
		self.view.custom.dirty = False
	else:
		# Revert editDraft from selected
		sel = self.view.custom.selected
		if sel and sel.get("id") is not None:
			meta = BlueRidge.Location.Location.metaFromLocation(BlueRidge.Location.Location.getOne(sel.get("id")))
			attrs = BlueRidge.Location.Location.buildAttributesForType(meta.get("locationTypeDefinitionId"), meta.get("id"))
			self.view.custom.editDraft = {"meta": meta, "attributes": attrs}
		self.view.custom.dirty = False

sel = self.view.custom.selected or {}
	locId = sel.get("id")
	if locId is None:
		return
	result = BlueRidge.Location.Location.handleDeprecate(locId)
	if not result:
		return
	# Order matters: clear the old selection state before swapping items.
	# Tree component caches its selected path internally; if the new items
	# arrive first, that cached path no longer resolves -- Component Error.
	self.view.custom.selected = None
	self.view.custom.selectedPath = None
	self.view.custom.editDraft = {"meta": None, "attributes": []}
	self.view.custom.mode = "view"
	self.view.custom.dirty = False
	self.view.custom.draftPath = None
	# Apply the refreshed tree (handleDeprecate re-anchors on the parent
	# of the deprecated row).
	self.view.custom.tree = result["tree"]
	# Now land selection on the parent so the operator keeps context.
	newParent = result.get("selected")
	if newParent and newParent.get("id") is not None:
		self.view.custom.selectedPath = result.get("selectedPath")
		self.view.custom.selected = newParent
		loc = BlueRidge.Location.Location.getOne(newParent.get("id"))
		if loc:
			meta = BlueRidge.Location.Location.metaFromLocation(loc)
			attrs = BlueRidge.Location.Location.buildAttributesForType(meta.get("locationTypeDefinitionId"), meta.get("id"))
			self.view.custom.editDraft = {"meta": meta, "attributes": attrs}
			self.view.custom.mode = "update"

# Reset locationTypeDefinitionId when Type changes
	draft = self.view.custom.editDraft or {"meta": None, "attributes": []}
	meta = dict(draft.get("meta") or {})
	meta["locationTypeDefinitionId"] = None
	self.view.custom.editDraft = {"meta": meta, "attributes": []}
	self.view.custom.dirty = True
	# Stash the selected Type Id in a transient view custom so DefinitionDropdown can read it.
	self.view.custom.draftTypeId = event.newValue if hasattr(event, "newValue") else self.props.value

transforms.code: return [{"label": t.get("Name"), "value": t.get("Id")} for t in (value or [])]
return [{"label": d.get("Name"), "value": d.get("Id")} for d in (value or [])]

config.script:
result = BlueRidge.Location.Location.handleMoveUp(self.view.custom.selected)
	if result:
		self.view.custom.tree = result["tree"]
		self.view.custom.selectedPath = result["selectedPath"]
		self.view.custom.selected = result["selected"]

result = BlueRidge.Location.Location.handleMoveDown(self.view.custom.selected)
	if result:
		self.view.custom.tree = result["tree"]
		self.view.custom.selectedPath = result["selectedPath"]
		self.view.custom.selected = result["selected"]

transforms.code:
rows = value or []
	n = len(rows)
	return [
		{
			"index":        i,
			"totalRows":    n,
			"definitionId": r.get("definitionId"),
			"name":         r.get("name") or "",
			"value":        r.get("value") or "",
			"dataType":     r.get("dataType") or "",
			"uom":          r.get("uom") or "",
			"required":     bool(r.get("required")),
			"defaultValue": r.get("defaultValue") or ""
		}
		for i, r in enumerate(rows)
	]

props.text: Select a Location to view details, or click + Add Location to create one.

customMethods.name: handleLocationChange
customMethods.script:
loc = BlueRidge.Location.Location.getOne(currId)
	if not loc:
		self.view.custom.editDraft = {"meta": None, "attributes": []}
		self.view.custom.mode = "view"
		self.view.custom.dirty = False
		return
	meta = BlueRidge.Location.Location.metaFromLocation(loc)
	attrs = BlueRidge.Location.Location.buildAttributesForType(meta.get("locationTypeDefinitionId"), meta.get("id"))
	self.view.custom.editDraft = {"meta": meta, "attributes": attrs}
	self.view.custom.mode = "update"
	self.view.custom.dirty = False
	self.view.custom.draftPath = None
	self.view.custom.oldSelectedPath = self.view.custom.selectedPath

customMethods.name: handleSave
customMethods.script:
draft = self.view.custom.editDraft or {}
	result = BlueRidge.Location.Location.handleSaveAll(draft.get("meta") or {}, draft.get("attributes") or [])
	if not result:
		return
	self.view.custom.tree = result["tree"]
	self.view.custom.selectedPath = result["selectedPath"]
	self.view.custom.selected = result["selected"]
	self.view.custom.editDraft = result["editDraft"]
	self.view.custom.mode = result["mode"]
	self.view.custom.draftPath = None
	self.view.custom.dirty = False

messageHandlers.script:
action = payload.get("action") if payload else None
	#pending = self.view.custom.pendingNav
	if action == "save":
		draft = self.view.custom.editDraft or {}
		self.handleSave()
		
		#self.view.custom.pendingNav = None
		self.handleLocationChange(self.view.custom.selected.id)
	elif action == "discard":
		self.view.custom.dirty = False
		self.view.custom.draftPath = None
		#self.view.custom.pendingNav = None
		BlueRidge.Common.Notify.toast("Discarded", "Changes discarded.", "info")
		self.handleLocationChange(self.view.custom.selected.id)
	else:
		self.view.custom.selectedPath = self.view.custom.oldSelectedPath
